train.prompt: Set up an AI-first development workflow for my engineering team
Define the operating model where AI agents generate most of the implementation
How should our team review and quality-check code that AI agents write
I want my developers to supervise AI output rather than write everything manually
We are adopting AI coding assistants, how should we restructure our development process

Optimize PostgreSQL queries for the reporting module

val.prompt: Create review processes for AI-generated code in our team workflow

Deploy the application with zero downtime
Design the database schema for an e-commerce platform
